# terrible_dellemc_powerflex_sdt (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `sdt_name` (String) The name of the SDT. Mandatory for all operations. It is unique across the PowerFlex array.

### Optional

- `discovery_port` (Number) Discovery port of the SDT.
- `maintenance_mode` (String) Maintenance mode state of the SDT.
- `nvme_port` (Number) NVMe port of the SDT.
- `protection_domain_name` (String) The name of the protection domain.
- `sdt_ip_list` (String) Dictionary of IPs and their roles for the SDT. At least one IP-role is mandatory while creating a SDT. IP-roles can be updated as well.
- `sdt_new_name` (String) SDT new name, can only be used for renaming the SDT. Only used for updates. Ignored during creation.
- `state` (String) State of the SDT.
- `storage_port` (Number) Storage port of the SDT.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether or not the resource has changed.
- `sdt_details` (String) Details of the SDT.
